ddls:
CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab (e.g., Hub Microroom, Bosler Microroom) */,
  "monday_friday_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours for Monday to Friday */,
  "weekend_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours for the weekend */,
  "num_pcs" INTEGER /* Number of PCs available in the lab */,
  "num_macs" INTEGER /* Number of Macs available in the lab */,
  "laser_printing" INTEGER /* Whether the lab has laser printing services */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific room number or building location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users the lab can accommodate */,
  "wifi_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the Wi-Fi signal (e.g., weak, moderate, strong) */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Features that make the lab accessible (e.g., wheelchair access, screen readers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin, IT staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or faculty the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., basic, advanced, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the lab */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's visit in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., PC, Mac, mobile) */,
  "login_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, canceled, pending) */,
  "reason_for_cancellation" TEXT /* Reason if the reservation was canceled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the equipment is located */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., PC, Mac, printer) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., available, under maintenance, retired) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each piece of equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date the warranty expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "assigned_technician" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned to the maintenance */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_assigned_technician FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_technician") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users in the lab on the given date */,
  "peak_hour" TEXT /* Peak hour of usage */,
  "peak_users" INTEGER /* Number of users during the peak hour */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of user visits in minutes */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_usage_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, maintenance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path or URL to the report document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_reports_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., usage, conduct, printing) */,
  "policy_content" TEXT /* Content of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was last reviewed */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is due for the next review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_policies_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response or action taken based on the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_feedback_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
